headline: Vanderpump Blooms x Bloom Haus, Floral Collection by Lisa Vanderpump, Expands Line
summary: The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR) today announced the expansion of Vanderpump Blooms x Bloom Haus, a floral collection curated by businesswoman, TV personality, author and philanthropist Lisa Vanderpump to include Vanderpump Home featuring several new products available in stores now with more to be released throughout the year. Available exclusively at Kroger Family of Stores, the additional items include an assortment of floral-inspired candles, a plant care starter kit, ornaments, preserved and silk

headline: KR Stock In Focus: Wells Fargo Flags ‘Choppy’ Road Ahead As Kroger Faces Flat Q2 Earnings Growth
summary: Wells Fargo lowered its price target on Kroger to $58 from $68 and kept an ‘Equal Weight’ rating on the stock.

headline: Guggenheim Maintains Buy on Kroger, Lowers Price Target to $71
summary: Guggenheim  analyst John Heinbockel   maintains Kroger (NYSE:KR) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $78 to $71.

headline: These Analysts Slash Their Forecasts On Kroger Following Q1 Earnings
summary: Kroger (NYSE:KR) reported mixed Q1 results with adjusted earnings of $1.58 per share and revenue of $46.12 billion. The company maintains its fiscal outlook and CEO expresses confidence in becoming America's best grocer. Analysts lower price targets.

headline: Kroger (KR) Delivers Strong Sales but Weaker Margins, Says BMO Capital
